audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 162-164 unconditionally check `order.feeAmount > 0` and revert with `InvalidFeeAmount()` on every execution path. The `order` is decoded directly from the caller-supplied `signature` argument at L123, so `feeAmount` is always the attacker-controlled value. No code path from L119 to the return at L175 can bypass this check.
